马上就能找到物品的简单管理软件！

整理整顿后找不到东西，是不是很困扰吗？

使用“哪里哪里”就能马上找到要找的东西！


建造房子，制作家具，分配储物柜，把东西全部放进去吧。


书籍和重要的收藏、兴趣的道具、孩子的玩具、季节的衣服、回忆的物品等，有助于整理家里所有的东西。

无论是不能扔东西的人，还是非常喜欢整理整顿东西的人，这都是非常适合的应用程序。

cn.description:
欢迎来到火山国！
这里盛行炼金术，崇尚着骑士精神，剑与魔法。心怀对亡妻的思念，你独自带着女儿在这里生活。

【丰富多样的养成路线】
成为骑士？学者？大明星？安排女儿的课程学习和业余生活，挑战种植、烹饪、钓鱼、骰子对决......
数十种趣味小游戏，让女儿的数值upup！

【全新服饰 等你解锁】
移动版预约即可获赠全新服饰，从夏火年穿到冬火年！多套令人意想不到的神秘服饰等你解锁——美少女露丝，变身！

【成长，然后发现世界的真相】
面对女儿成长中遇到的各种随机事件，应对来自魔族首领“鸮姬”的挑战。
在这个暗潮汹涌的国度里，女儿又该如何做出她的选择？火山国的命运正握在你的手中!

【向更远的未来......出发！】
超过12个恋情结局和50个职业结局，结识和攻略火山国的各位居民，目送女儿走出自己的多彩人生......
你会永远支持女儿的，对吧？

cn.description:
===铁皮公司正版授权===

比以往任何时候都更具威胁和力量，王国保卫战5 带来了一种全新、令人兴奋的体验，以其前作的快节奏和引人入胜的玩法为基础，赢得了奖项的赞誉。

当一个强大的邪恶势力在王国上空出现时，一个意想不到的联盟形成了——发动终极塔防战役，用两支军队中最精锐的力量来保卫整个王国和领域！虽然他们暂时并肩作战，但临时联盟内部典型的纷争可能会改变后续冒险的走向。

准备好释放双英雄的强大力量，在塔防战斗中扭转战局吧！
没错，现在你可以同时控制两条龙！双倍的喷火乐趣，双倍的混乱——只要确保他们不会因为谁能囤积更多的金子争吵！

所有重量级角色如圣骑士、弓箭手、法师、死灵法师等等都听你指挥。但要注意，他们可能会开始争论谁是队伍中的真正英雄，而敌人却悄悄溜过去！ 
你准备好迎接终极对决了吗？和利尼维亚的勇敢战士们以及不屈不挠的黑暗军团，踏上征服一个巨大敌人的史诗旅程。  

游戏特色：
招募34名独特的英雄和防御塔！

- 18个精英防御塔的建造和升级
骑士顶在最前方、弓箭手百步穿杨、法师的奥术魔法、死灵法师的亡灵之力，甚至还有能召唤恶魔的深渊祭坛！——这些经典强力塔都将听从你的号令！

- 16个史诗英雄 - 将塔防战斗提升到新的水平
同时控制2名英雄去战斗！
准备见证最不可能的双英雄组合的强大威力！森林守护灵搭配钢铁傀儡？
时空法师携手“普通勇士”？看似离奇的搭档，也能爆发惊人威力！

- 6种不同地形，更有迷人的战场等你征服
保卫Kingdom Rush的多彩景观。穿越王国深林，甚至其危险的洞穴作战。

- 25个充满快节奏塔防战斗的战役阶段
在充满惊喜挑战和细节的异国地形中设定你的策略。
面对成群的不可预测的敌人和史诗般的boss战斗，将你的防御策略推向极限！

- 3种不同的游戏模式来测试你的实力
在取得胜利后，尝试以更具挑战性的方式玩每个阶段。谁不喜欢一个好的挑战呢？

- 58多个游戏成就在战斗中征服
没有诱人的奖励，史诗策略游戏算什么？展示你的技能，解锁奖励！

- 45种以上不同的敌人来测试你的塔防智慧
展现联盟的塔防战斗技能，对抗4个不同的敌人氏族。用独特的防御策略击败他们每一个！

- 当然…
有很多复活节彩蛋和Ironhide Game Studio一贯的轻松幽默。
因为没有一些隐藏的惊喜，策略游戏算什么呢？

cn.description:
《避难所：生存》是一款核辐射下的末日生存游戏。在游戏中你将扮演主人公泰德，需要在被核弹袭击的前60秒，合理储备你的物资，营救你的家人至避难所。在游戏中你需要做出一些困难的决定，例如合理分配食物和处理变异蟑螂的袭击等等。

在游戏中你可以坚持多少天？每个人是否都能活下来？当食物耗尽时，又该何去何从？要知道无论你捡到什么，无论你救了谁，都将对你的生存起到至关重要的作用。在游戏中每一个生存故事都是不同的，每天都会有出乎意料的事情发生，所以你需要定量配给食物和水，充分利用你的供给，甚至冒险进入荒地...话不多说，祝你好运！

cn.description:
《鬼谷八荒》是一款开放世界的沙盒修仙游戏。结合了修仙体系与山海经文化背景，体验从凡人一步步修行成长为强者的过程，与山海经中各种妖、兽战斗。你是否能坚守本心，与困难做斗争；慎做抉择，把握自己的命运。

【遁入修仙世界，开启逆天人生】
鬼谷八荒, 除了财侣法地，还有诡秘莫测的妖兽，危机重重的秘境，难以逾越的天堑，彩光四射的秘宝，等着被人发现。
你将作为一个炼气期小修士从愚村出发，修炼，变强，危机中九死一生。每一次突破，你都能逆天改命，助你在旅途中披荆斩棘，跨越五大州，睥睨天下，再闯上天元山，向天道一问。
【ai互动生态，给NPC完整的一生】
我们构建了完整的NPC互动生态，他们“生活”在这里，有自己的朋友亲族关系网，自己的人生轨迹，不受玩家的进度限制，除非，你决定出手干涉。
你可兼济天下，携手红颜；你可独善其身，快意恩仇；你亦可逆天而行，与全世界为敌。
和NPC们切磋武艺，传授道心，拜师学艺，收徒授业。和NPC在拍卖场喊价厮杀，结束后拔刀相向或顺手牵羊。你将成为修仙界群像中的一部分，是大放异彩，还是默默修行，皆看你如何选择。
【体验小说桥段，感受奇遇惊喜】
英雄救美？爱人为你争风吃醋？五十年之约？卷入神秘组织的明争暗斗？遗迹遇宝？又惨遭夺宝？
这些都有可能发生在你身上。
除NPC交互之外，这里还有丰富的随机事件以及支线任务，在你的旅途中给予惊喜。它们或许会让你烦恼，喂你刀子，也可能让你化险为夷，甚至破而后立。在一步又一步的选择的过程中，你将谱写只属于你的，独一无二的故事。
【打造最强宗门，攻城略地一统八荒】
我们构建了宗门的经营玩法，身为弟子，长老以及宗主，将会有不同的体验。你可以加入大宗门，从最底层的弟子做起，一步步爬上权力的阶梯。也可以空降落魄的小宗门，力挽狂澜，带领宗门重振雄风。
弟子可以完成宗门任务，在宗门大比中出战，或随同门出征作战，为宗门积累资源，为宗门赢取荣誉，为宗门扩张土地。
长老可以管辖门下弟子，传道授业，分配任务职能，加速宗门成长，在宗门大战中指导弟子大杀四方。
宗主则需要统筹全宗的秩序，制定侵略和防守计划，攻防灵矿等资源点，甚至占领他人宗门，夺取专属逆天改命和秘籍。
一统八荒，只要你有宏图壮志和铁腕手段，不再只是幻想。
【构筑独特流派，挑战妖兽神仙】
闯荡这世界，需要有傍身之技。
心法筑根基，武技/灵技探深浅，身法创机会，绝技造优势，神通定乾坤。不同秘籍有不同的特性。
修仙者还有十二大灵根，对应不同的流派，你可以选择专精一路，或全面发展。十二种灵根都有对应的功法秘籍，排列组合可组成丰富的流派，孰强孰弱，皆由你评断。
城镇琅琊阁，宗门功法阁，秘境，各种任务，甚至路边一个土坑里，都可能发现珍奇秘籍，充满惊喜。
这个世界上还有上百种珍奇妖兽，无数修仙者，鬼怪，仙人供您检验自己的实力。挑战升仙擂台，冲击各大洲参玄榜，以此证明自己的实力。你能否踏破冥山的障碍一路向前？构筑的流派能否经历大浪淘沙的检验？
【法宝器灵炼丹画符，三大神器伴前路】
练好自身本领，也别忘了外力加持。
开局三大神器，每一个都会给你带来一种独一无二的系统。双鱼佩可以复活自己和选中之人，昊天眼可以偷学妖兽技能，洞察更多信息，而炼妖壶则可以让你捕获BOSS成为你的小跟班，替你战斗或派遣寻求宝物。
除了开局神器之外，你也能炼制你自己的法宝，并收服器灵与你一起战斗，此外器灵还会在探索中给予你陪伴，触发专属的奇遇等等。
在这里，你还可以学习炼丹画符，堪舆风水，制作帮助你探索世界，整蛊仇人，战斗杀敌的种种道具。至于如何发挥它们真正的作用，皆看各位道友如何抉择。

《冰钓大师》是一款终极冰上钓鱼游戏，融合沙盒元素，让玩家体检冬季垂钓的乐趣。稀有的垂钓目标、栩栩如生的画面、逼真的物理机制、鱼类行为系统、广泛的渔具选择、不同游戏模式的单人和多人游戏、全世界各个不同地点、不断变化的季节、时间和天气条件，共同打造成这一款终极冰钓模拟游戏。鱼类挣扎、钓鱼地点、世界各地的物种等，这些都是其他冰钓游戏没有的功能，也是它们让这款游戏成为独一无二的钓鱼游戏。

游戏功能：
-单人模式
-32 种鱼
-21 个开放世界地图
-18 种竞争模式
-18 场锦标赛
-鱼类挣扎
-大量的数值统计
-角色自定义
-抖杆，通过抖杆来引诱鱼吞饵
-变化的天气和时间
-季节变化（秋季、冬季、春季）
-鱼类行为引擎。控制每个鱼类的人工智能和集群智能系统
-渔具，学习并掌握使用数十种鱼钩、鱼竿、钻头、鱼饵和鱼饵

道具描述：
在这款游戏里，玩家可以在美丽的开放世界地图中随意漫游，在不同的环境中探索河流、池塘和湖泊。敢于深入人迹罕至的野外，找到最大的渔获。
通过学习每个地点的深度地图和冰层底部拓扑结构来找到最好的垂钓点，这是一件很有趣的事情，但需要耐心和专注。钓鱼者最大的期待莫过于，在每一片湖泊找到最佳钓鱼点或者掉到最大的鱼。当把钓鱼线投入水中，等到鱼上钩时，真正激动人心的时刻就开始了！相比掌握位置，在正确的环境里使用正确的装备也同样重要。真实的鱼类行为系统，将近30种鱼的人工智能和集群智能系统让这款游戏成为高度模拟的钓鱼体验。玩家可以选择各种不同的鱼钩、鱼竿、钻头和鱼饵。对付不同鱼类的完美渔具组合取决于季节，天气和白天的环境尤为重要。在《冰钓大师》中，以正确的方式和深度控制水中的鱼竿和鱼钩本身就是一项技能。鱼竿和鱼钩的物理机制确保鱼类会对玩家的行为做出真实的反应： 一方面，独自垂钓没有时间限制，也没有竞争对手，玩家可以在家舒适地练习你的钓鱼技能，不失为不错的休闲方式；另一方面，漫长的锦标赛和自定义程度极高的单项比赛会考验玩家的技能和知识，但玩家会得到全新装备和无限荣誉作为奖励。

cn.description:
无与伦比的地铁模拟游戏《模拟地铁》现已登陆 iPhone 和 iPad。

• 入选 App Store 2016 年度最佳游戏
• 30 多个国家/地区的年度 Mac 游戏
• 英国电影电视艺术学院奖提名
• 荣获独立游戏节大奖
• IGN 年度移动游戏提名
• 入选 Gamespot 2016 年度最佳移动游戏

《模拟地铁》是一款为迅速发展城市而设计的地铁路线图游戏。连接各个站点之间的路线，开始运营列车。开放新站点时，透过重新规划使地铁路线保持高效运营。做决策，充分利用有限资源。你能使这座城市持续前进多久呢？

• 随机的城市发展规模，因此每个游戏均独一无二。
• 20座真实的城市，考验你的规划技能。
• 各种升级道具，有效调整铁路网路。
• 在普通模式中快速得分，在无限模式中放松，或在极限模式中面对终极挑战。
• 每天在每日挑战中与全球玩家一较高下。
• 提供夜间模式和色盲模式。
• 由 Disasterpeace （FEZ配乐师！）亲自操刀的自动配乐程序。

cn.description:
从寒冷的城堡冻原，乘坐疾驰的火车穿过沙漠，直至最后的边界。 全力以赴从各种生存条件艰辛密室中逃脱出来。探索各具风格的密室，密室建有多层地板、屋顶、通风口和地下隧道。开发你的创造力，使用各种日用品（肥皂和袜子）或一些有趣的随手可见的餐具等物品（叉子或钢板）制造武器和工具。

【游戏玩法】：
-顶级特色密室：
全力以赴从世界上生存环境最艰苦的密室中逃脱出来。你需要遵守密室的规定，做各种工作并遵循严格的日常安排；所有的一切都是在努力为你争取自由，早日逃出密室！

-建立你的装扮：
从大量的定制中选择你的角色，使其独一无二。当你策划逃脱时，时尚装扮很重要。

-制定你的逃脱计划：
在监狱里，你要开发你的创造力，使用有限的工具来制作各种道具。你可以将日常用品（如肥皂和袜子）组合起来，制造新的武器和工具，以帮助你实现目标。也可以从自助餐厅拿到叉子，在房间里铺一条隧道，并通过杂志和胶带制作海报以隐藏痕迹。你将很快了解到，胶带解决一切！

-逃脱队组合：
联合最多 3 个朋友组建终极逃脱团队，并设计出最疯狂的逃脱计划！聚拢于沙发上，为你的暗中冒险做准备。通过合作，你将创建更加精细和勇敢的计划。感觉没有竞争性？你可以进入对战模式，并显示出你有能力比你的朋友更快地逃脱任何密室。如果其他一切都失败了，在密室天井上解决你的敌对目标！

-准备战斗：
《逃脱者：困境突围》引入了全新的战斗系统，使每个密室的战斗更加激动人心以及具有互动性。你可以保持攻击姿态并围绕你的目标走动，以在作战中获得上风；也可以在合适的时间格挡已减少伤害。确保你先到健身房锻炼肌肉！

-逃脱新方法：
随着密室越来越艰苦，你将不得不策划更加周密的逃脱计划。应对任何密室逃脱都有很多选择。尝试制作药物混合物来伪造自己的死亡，让太平间做剩下的工作！

【游戏特色】：
-最多4名玩家合作逃脱
-玩家之间可以联机对战
-超过 300 个角色装扮定制
-多层密室，给你最真实的场景体验

《手机帝国》是一款以“造手机”为题材的高自由度单机模拟经营游戏。你扮演一名回到2001年的创业者，因为独到的眼光拿到了神秘投资人的启动资金，进而创立了一家可能改变世界的科技企业。游戏从2001年开始到2035年结束，你将从研发最早期的九宫格智能手机开始，一直到研发可完全独立使用的AR智能眼镜结束。在这35年时间里，你将亲历、见证、推动智能手机波澜壮阔的发展历程，并有机会把你的公司发展成为世界第一的科技企业。

•有深度的玩法
《手机帝国》的核心玩法是研发更好的图纸、升级更牛的科技、打造更强的团队、研发更好的手机、赚取更多的利润，如此循环。而“如何用人”是整个游戏的精髓所在，根据员工的能力、天赋和技能，把合适的员工放到合适的岗位才会发挥出其最大潜能。员工的配合还会触发团队突破效果，这是一个可以让你突破科技限制从而创造奇迹的新机制。

•海量的内容
你在游戏中可研发经典的九宫格手机、全键盘手机、早期触控手机、全面屏手机、折叠屏手机，甚至未来的AR智能眼镜，总共有超过100种手机外观供你研究。

•不断进阶的科技
游戏中的电池、屏幕、材质、相机等均可不断升级，在你资金充裕时甚至可以启动CPU和操作系统的自研项目，你将有可能研发出性能逆天的芯片来大幅提升自己的手机品质。

•新颖的竞争体验
你作为科技公司的CEO将与各个时期的科技巨头们展开竞争，你可以选择和他们搞好关系共谋发展，也可以为争夺优秀人才展开挖人大战。

•大量的随机事件
为了增加游戏的世界感，我们在游戏中融入了大量的随机事件，包括：世界事件、行业新闻、危机事件、幸运事件、员工事件、记者采访等等，甚至还包括比如太空电梯、火星登陆、AI大爆发等未来事件。

•独创的说服系统
为了更好的模拟现实生活中的人才招揽过程，我们在游戏中内置了一款小游戏，该游戏以古老的“九型人格”为原型，玩家需要根据招募对象的不同人格类型，采用不同的沟通技巧和策略来说服对方。越是顶级的人才，说服的难度越高。

•更多等待你探索的内容
游戏中还包括信用评级、企业并购、情报系统、员工培养、公司战略等其他好玩的元素等待你来探索。

cn.description:
[游戏说明]

由幻刃网络研发，心动网络发行的《ICEY》是一款2D横版动作游戏，跟随旁白的指示，你将会通过ICEY的眼睛去看，去战斗并发掘在游戏中世界的真相。但其实，这也根本不是一款2D横版动作游戏，你也不会通过ICEY的眼睛去看，你也不会去探寻这个世界的真相。

本质上说《ICEY》是一款Meta游戏，玩家需要通过对抗旁白的指示，思考何为游戏、何为真相等等命题。在《ICEY》中，你扮演的是ICEY，而非“你自己”。当然你也可以扮演“你自己”，而非ICEY。这是一个包裹着动作游戏外衣的陷阱。

现在，就是你发掘其真正故事的时刻。

[游戏特色]

·高速战斗： 高速移动，将敌人玩弄于股掌之中。 不能迟疑，当机立断进行攻击、反击或是闪避！ 这才是你的生存之道！ 

·华丽的连招系统： 操作简单，稍微练习即可打出华丽连击。 不同技能各有特性，灵活组合才能顺利过关。 

·巨型Boss战： 众多超巨型Boss，充满压迫力的战斗场面。 Boss攻击方法多样，只有找出破绽才能化险为夷。 

·Meta元素： 玩家在整个游戏进行中需结合旁白判断自己下一步的行动。 但是，通过对碎片信息的分析及整理，玩家会渐渐改变自己的行为及思考模式去进行游戏并探索其中真正的剧情及核心内容。 跟随指引，还是叛逆而为。

一切，由你决定。你，准备好了吗？	

［获奖荣耀］

-Nominated, Tokyo Game Show 2016 電擊PlayStation Best Indie Games
-Official Selection, 2016 Gamescom Indie Arena Booth
-Most Promising Game 2nd Prize, Taipei Game Show 2016

-Best Technology Award, Indieplay 2015

阿丽娜和弗莱德特这对好朋友落入了一座座生机勃勃的梦幻岛屿花园，花园里到处都是他们童年时用过的日常物品。他们携手踏上一段的情感之旅，审视友谊的意义：他们共同创造的回忆，必须舍弃的东西，还有永远不该遗忘的事物。

这对朋友迷失在一个可以塑造因果的神秘领域，发现时间能在各个方向流动。操控时间来解决谜题并到达每座小岛的顶峰。跟随两人一起揭开和探索他们共同度过的重要时光，点亮一个个星座，照亮苦乐参半的故事线索。

获奖剧情
• 充满活力，受故事启发的艺术风格。
• 关于冒险、友谊和成长的梦幻故事。
• 具有个人故事的华丽单人游戏体验。
• 精心设计的谜题需要掌控好时间才能解开。
• 探索二十多个神秘的超现实花园岛屿。
• 在手机上畅享主机游戏画质。

量身打造
• 随时随地离线游玩。
• 不中断。无广告。无应用程式内支付。
• 无障碍设计；简单控制，无文字、语音、时间压力或复杂UI。
• 由特色艺术家Tim Shiel打造的舒缓背景配乐。
• 支援横向宽屏游玩或高大纵向视图。
• 寻找和完成十七项成就。

cn.description:
《无处遁形：全网公敌》是Steam平台广受好评的剧情向黑客解密游戏《全网公敌》手游版本。玩家通过网络搜索和社工手段获取目标人物信息，其隐藏最深的秘密都无处遁形。游戏中的每个故事看似各自独立，但随着剧情的发展却是草蛇灰线，伏脉千里。当所有事件串联起来，竟隐藏着惊天的秘密……

希望玩家在游玩的同时，对网络本身也能产生反思，学会保护好个人隐私。

【游戏内容】
◆第一章：程序员之死
某公司CEO跳楼自杀，自称被毒妻勒索千万；而妻子却在社交网络上发布被家暴的照片。谣言满天，谁在说谎？
◆第二章：看不见的眼睛
女大学生的不雅视频在网络疯传，这一刻，她已然社会性死亡。到底谁才是始作俑者？女性的安全又该由谁去保护？
◆第三章：消失的证据
品学兼优的学生会长忽然失踪。霸凌事件使案情越发扑朔迷离。谁是凶手，谁是受害者？
◆第四章：羞辱的代价
天降巨瓜，女歌星再次被爆黑料！恐吓信、炒作、前女团成员自杀事件……网络再掀舆论狂欢！
◆第五章：永生代码
当社会陷入癫狂，你是否也愿意加入永生代码，获得真正的爱与永生？
◆DLC：甜蜜之家
一个看似甜蜜而美满的家庭背后，每个人都有各自的秘密，隐藏在背后的真相到底是什么？！
◆DLC：HelloWorld
一场离奇的车祸，让泰坦公司的高级研究员Lucrezia Borgia博士当场死亡，同行的Benjamin Engle死里逃生，但他却没有意识到自己即将卷入一场巨大的阴谋之中……

【游戏特点】
◆代入感强：在虚构的世界里，玩家扮演一名黑客，接受一家公司委托，完成一个个不同的社工事件，体验真实的黑客操作。
◆玩法多样：游戏内有多个系统，除了社工系统，还会有推理、追踪、解谜，破坏侵入等系统需要玩家们去一一攻破。
◆剧情复杂：游戏中你将面临大量的选择和谜题，而不同的选择可能将导致不同的结局。
◆人物众多：登场人物众多，每个人物都有自己的性格特点，而他们背后都有着不为人知的故事，需要作为黑客的你去一一发现事件的真相。
◆全程配音：游戏中所有出现的角色都有真人配音，让整个游戏的体验和代入感更加强烈。
◆原创音乐：多首原创主题曲以及各种音乐音效，搭配精彩剧情，享受震撼体验。

【核心功能】
◆网络搜索：玩家通过浏览器搜索功能收集目标对象的基础信息。
◆数据库：利用已知信息输入到数据库中，通过筛选后或许目标对象的其他信息。
◆破解：通过获得的目标人物信息来生成密码，用于登陆各平台的账户（包括邮箱、社交平台、聊天软件等）。
◆伪装：获取目标对象的需求、社交圈等，根据信息选择伪装，通过和目标对象接触获取更多信息。
◆聊天沟通：添加目标对象为好友后，进行聊天沟通获取信息。
◆图片分析：从图片中获取有价值的信息内容及相关线索。
当然，后期还会解锁更多的高阶社工方法！

《破门而入：行动小队》是一款独具特色的2D反恐战术游戏，它将策略的深度与动作的爽快感完美结合。在游戏中，你需要指挥特警小队，在错综复杂的室内环境中直面各种致命威胁。

游戏主要体验在于：

风格迥异的作战成员：6位特警队员各自拥有专属的武器、技能与升级路线，无论是正面强攻还是隐秘行动，都能找到合适的执行者。配合超过60种枪械装备，战术组合千变万化。

持续不断的新鲜体验：完成主线任务后，“无尽高塔”模式提供了极高的随机性挑战，而“僵尸入侵”模式则让你在熟悉的战场上，用全新的方式对抗成群的僵尸。

总之，如果你渴望一款能真正让自己运筹帷幄的战术游戏，本作将是绝佳选择。

cn.description:
宠物对战与银河恶魔城的融合。在可爱的侧视像素世界中收集和训练怪物，并让其为你作战。

【寻找灵魂使魔，成为你最可靠的冒险伙伴】
跟随先人的步伐，成为一个怪物饲养人并拯救怪物避难所。借助收集的怪物组建团队，开展史诗般冒险，解锁不断扩张的世界。在成为终极怪物饲养人的过程中，你将揭开威胁着人类与怪物之间和平的谜团。

【探索银河恶魔城式的世界】
探索银河恶魔城式的世界。借助培养的怪物们各种专属能力，你可以在这个世界上进行探索，拓宽自己视界。砍掉树藤、撞倒墙壁、滑过间隙......在怪物的帮助下，通通不在话下。

【组建你自己的队伍】

hk.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

hk.description:
Aerofly FS Global is one of the most sophisticated Flight Simulators for your mobile device, suitable for beginner and professional flight sim pilots alike. Explore the world of flying with extremely detailed and accurately simulated airliners, fully interactive 3D cockpits and realistic aircraft systems. Fly with complex airliners, helicopters, business jets, fighter jets and warbirds, general aviation aircraft, aerobatic stuntplanes and gliders across the photorealistic landscape.

IMPORTANT NOTE: The level of graphics details depends on your device performance and memory.

▶ AIRCRAFT
8 aircraft included in the base app:
• Airbus A320, Dash 8-Q400, Learjet 45, Cessna 172, Baron 58, Aermacchi MB339, F-15E Strike Eagle, Jungmeister

Over 30 more aircraft available as in-app purchases, like Airbus A350, Airbus A380, Boeing B777, Boeing B787,  F/A-18 Hornet, Concorde, UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter, CRJ-900 and many more

▶ DEFAULT SCENERY
Included scenery in the base product: 
• US west coast from Sacramento to Monterey including the San Francisco Bay Area region 
• Detailed custom made airports

▶ GLOBAL SCENERY
IMPORTANT NOTE: The global scenery streaming service requires a working internect connection
Explore the world with our global scenery streaming! Global streaming is available as prepaid subscription and adds world wide scenery coverage and other global features:
• Global high-res aerial images and elevation data
• Global 3D buildings, objects and points of interest (on selected and powerful devices)
• Global night lighting
• 2000+ hand made airports
• 6000+ global airports

▶ SIM FEATURES
• Pushback
• High resolution aerial images
• 3D buildings and terminals

hk.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

《手機帝國》是一款以“造手機”為題材的高自由度單機模擬經營遊戲。你扮演一名回到2001年的創業者，因為獨到的眼光拿到了神秘投資人的啟動資金，進而創立了一家可能改變世界的科技企業。遊戲從2001年開始到2035年結束，你將從研發最早期的九宮格智能手機開始，一直到研發可完全獨立使用的AR智能眼鏡結束。在這35年時間裡，你將親歷、見證、推動智能手機波瀾壯闊的發展歷程，並有機會把你的公司發展成為世界第一的科技企業。

• 有深度的玩法
《手機帝國》的核心玩法是研發更好的圖紙、升級更牛的科技、打造更強的團隊、研發更好的手機、賺取更多的利潤，如此循環。而“如何用人”是整個遊戲的精髓所在，根據員工的能力、天賦和技能，把合適的員工放到合適的崗位才會發揮出其最大潛能。員工的配合還會觸發團隊突破效果，這是一個可以讓你突破科技限制從而創造奇蹟的新機制。

• 充足的遊戲時長
《手機帝國》的遊戲內時間長達35年，將從2001年開始到2035年結束，你將親歷、見證、推動智能手機波瀾壯闊的發展歷程。

• 海量的內容
你在遊戲中可研發經典的九宮格手機、全鍵盤手機、早期觸控手機、全面屏手機、折疊屏手機，甚至未來的AR智能眼鏡，總共有超過100種手機外觀供你研究。

• 不斷進階的科技
遊戲中的電池、屏幕、材質、相機等均可不斷升級，在你資金充裕時甚至可以啟動CPU和操作系統的自研項目，你將有可能研發出性能逆天的芯片來大幅提升自己的手機品質。

• 新穎的競爭體驗
你作為科技公司的CEO將與各個時期的科技巨頭們展開競爭，你可以選擇和他們搞好關係共謀發展，也可以為爭奪優秀人才展開挖人大戰。

• 大量的隨機事件
為了增加遊戲的世界感，我們在遊戲中融入了大量的隨機事件，包括：世界事件、行業新聞、危機事件、幸運事件、員工事件、記者採訪等等，甚至還包括比如太空電梯、火星登陸、 AI大爆發等未來事件。

• 獨創的說服系統
為了更好的模擬現實生活中的人才招攬過程，我們在遊戲中內置了一款小遊戲，該遊戲以古老的“九型人格”為原型，玩家需要根據招募對象的不同人格類型，採用不同的溝通技巧和策略來說服對方。越是頂級的人才，說服的難度越高。

• 更多等待你探索的內容
遊戲中還包括信用評級、企業併購、情報系統、員工培養、公司戰略等其他好玩的元素等待你來探索。

hk.description:
[遊戲說明]

由幻刃網絡研發，心動網絡發行的《ICEY》是一款2D橫版動作遊戲，跟隨旁白的指示，你將會通過ICEY的眼睛去看，去戰鬥並發掘在遊戲中世界的真相。但其實，這也根本不是一款2D橫版動作遊戲，你也不會通過ICEY的眼睛去看，你也不會去探尋這個世界的真相。

本質上說《ICEY》是一款Meta遊戲，玩家需要通過對抗旁白的指示，思考何爲遊戲、何爲真相等等命題。在《ICEY》中，你扮演的是ICEY，而非“你自己”。當然你也可以扮演“你自己”，而非ICEY。這是一個包裹著動作遊戲外衣的陷阱。

現在，就是你發掘其真正故事的時刻。

[遊戲特色]

·高速戰鬥： 高速移動，將敵人玩弄于股掌之中。 不能遲疑，當機立斷進行攻擊、反擊或是閃避！ 這才是你的生存之道！ 

·華麗的連招系統： 操作簡單，稍微練習即可打出華麗連擊。 不同技能各有特性，靈活組合才能順利過關。 

·巨型Boss戰： 衆多超巨型Boss，充滿壓迫力的戰鬥場面。 Boss攻擊方法多樣，只有找出破綻才能化險爲夷。 

·Meta元素： 玩家在整個遊戲進行中需結合旁白判斷自己下一步的行動。 但是，通過對碎片信息的分析及整理，玩家會漸漸改變自己的行爲及思考模式去進行遊戲並探索其中真正的劇情及核心內容。 跟隨指引，還是叛逆而爲。

一切，由你決定。你，准備好了嗎？	

［獲獎榮耀］

-Nominated, Tokyo Game Show 2016 電擊PlayStation Best Indie Games
-Official Selection, 2016 Gamescom Indie Arena Booth
-Most Promising Game 2nd Prize, Taipei Game Show 2016

hk.description:
《無處遁形：全網公敵》是Steam平臺廣受好評的劇情向駭客解密遊戲《全網公敵》手遊版本。玩家通過網絡蒐索和社工手段獲取目標人物資訊，其隱藏最深的秘密都無處遁形。遊戲中的每個故事看似各自獨立，但隨著劇情的發展卻是草蛇灰線，伏脈千里。當所有事件串聯起來，竟隱藏著驚天的秘密……

希望玩家在遊玩的同時，對網絡本身也能產生反思，學會保護好個人隱私。

【遊戲內容】
◆第一章：程式師之死
某公司CEO跳樓自殺，自稱被毒妻勒索千萬； 而妻子卻在社交網絡上發佈被家暴的照片。 謠言滿天，誰在說謊？
◆第二章：看不見的眼睛
女大學生的不雅視頻在網絡瘋傳，這一刻，她已然社會性死亡。 到底誰才是始作俑者？ 女性的安全又該由誰去保護？
◆第三章：消失的證據
品學兼優的學生會長忽然失踪。 霸淩事件使案情越發撲朔迷離。 誰是兇手，誰是受害者？
◆第四章：羞辱的代價
天降巨瓜，女歌星再次被爆黑料！ 恐嚇信、炒作、前女團成員自殺事件……網絡再掀輿論狂歡！
◆第五章：永生代碼
當社會陷入癲狂，你是否也願意加入永生代碼，獲得真正的愛與永生？
◆DLC：甜蜜之家
一個看似甜蜜而美滿的家庭背後，每個人都有各自的秘密，隱藏在背後的真相到底是什麼？！
◆DLC：HelloWorld
一場離奇的車禍，讓泰坦公司的高級研究員Lucrezia Borgia博士當場死亡，同行的Benjamin Engle死裡逃生，但他卻沒有意識到自己即將捲入一場巨大的陰謀之中……

【遊戲特點】
◆代入感强：在虛構的世界裏，玩家扮演一名駭客，接受一家公司委託，完成一個個不同的社工事件，體驗真實的駭客操作。
◆玩法多樣：遊戲內有多個系統，除了社工系統，還會有推理、追跡、解謎，破壞侵入等系統需要玩家們去一一攻破。
◆劇情複雜：遊戲中你將面臨大量的選擇和謎題，而不同的選擇可能將導致不同的結局。
◆人物眾多：登場人物眾多，每個人物都有自己的性格特點，而他們背後都有著不為人知的故事，需要作為駭客的你去一一發現事件的真相。
◆全程配音：遊戲中所有出現的角色都有真人配音，讓整個遊戲的體驗和代入感更加强烈。
◆原創音樂：多首原創主題曲以及各種音樂音效，搭配精彩劇情，享受震撼體驗。

【覈心功能】
◆網絡蒐索：玩家通過瀏覽器搜索功能收集目標對象的基礎資訊。
◆資料庫：利用已知資訊輸入到資料庫中，通過篩選後或許目標對象的其他資訊。
◆破解：通過獲得的目標人物資訊來生成密碼，用於登入各平臺的帳戶（包括郵箱、社交平臺、聊天軟體等）。
◆偽裝：獲取目標對象的需求、社交圈等，根據資訊選擇偽裝，通過和目標對象接觸獲取更多資訊。
◆聊天溝通：添加目標對象為好友後，進行聊天溝通獲取資訊。
◆圖片分析：從圖片中獲取有價值的資訊內容及相關線索。
當然，後期還會解鎖更多的高階社工方法！

mo.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

顧客們在車站等待著火車的到來，把他們送到目的地。

完全不需要技術知識。

沒有應用內購買。沒有廣告。
請專注於遊戲。
在社交媒體上分享你的操作結果。

mo.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

在台湾和日本鐵路線上駕駛電車並載客。

・簡單的益智遊戲
“東京電車２”是一款規則簡單的益智遊戲。無需專業知識。
火車迷，遊戲迷，人人都能享受。

・致所有將成為行動調度員的人
在日本的早晨，顧客們正在等待火車的到來去上班。
讓我們啟動火車並運送客戶。

- 遊戲目標
日本鐵路公司是營利性組織。讓我們以高營業利潤為目標吧！

・如何產生利潤
票價收入-出發成本=營業利潤。

票價收入是在車站的顧客登上火車時產生的。
示例）如果兩名乘客在票價為 20 的車站上車，他們將獲得 40。

發車費按發車時的車廂數收取。
示例）2 節車廂的火車為 30，4 節車廂的火車為 40，10 節車廂的火車為 70。


一個人可以乘坐一輛車。
票價收入是在乘客登上火車時產生的。
調整行駛距離和車輛數量以獲得最大利潤。
離境費用。如果你開的火車太多，而佔用率下降，你就會損失收入。

·操作方法
控制非常簡單，規則也很簡單。
你所要做的就是調整列車的車廂數量，讓列車在最佳時間出發。
隨著遊戲的進行，將會出現各種變化，例如特快列車和換乘站。

·體積
享受 50 多條路線。
請體驗日本鐵路公司的各種運輸策略。

- 沒有廣告，沒有計費
沒有應用內購買。無廣告。
請專心玩遊戲。孩子們可以安心地玩耍。
讓我們分享在 社交媒體 上駕駛的結果。

・鐵路玩
JR東日本、JR東海、JR西日本、JR九州、東武、東急、西武、京王、京急、京阪、阪急、阪神、近鐵、名鐵、小田急、南海、西鐵、相鐵、京成、東京地鐵、大阪地鐵、都營地鐵, 筑波快遞

・容量約130MB
存儲負擔也小。根本沒有繁重的處理。

《手機帝國》是一款以“造手機”為題材的高自由度單機模擬經營遊戲。你扮演一名回到2001年的創業者，因為獨到的眼光拿到了神秘投資人的啟動資金，進而創立了一家可能改變世界的科技企業。遊戲從2001年開始到2035年結束，你將從研發最早期的九宮格智能手機開始，一直到研發可完全獨立使用的AR智能眼鏡結束。在這35年時間裡，你將親歷、見證、推動智能手機波瀾壯闊的發展歷程，並有機會把你的公司發展成為世界第一的科技企業。

• 有深度的玩法
《手機帝國》的核心玩法是研發更好的圖紙、升級更牛的科技、打造更強的團隊、研發更好的手機、賺取更多的利潤，如此循環。而“如何用人”是整個遊戲的精髓所在，根據員工的能力、天賦和技能，把合適的員工放到合適的崗位才會發揮出其最大潛能。員工的配合還會觸發團隊突破效果，這是一個可以讓你突破科技限制從而創造奇蹟的新機制。

• 充足的遊戲時長
《手機帝國》的遊戲內時間長達35年，將從2001年開始到2035年結束，你將親歷、見證、推動智能手機波瀾壯闊的發展歷程。

• 海量的內容
你在遊戲中可研發經典的九宮格手機、全鍵盤手機、早期觸控手機、全面屏手機、折疊屏手機，甚至未來的AR智能眼鏡，總共有超過100種手機外觀供你研究。

• 不斷進階的科技
遊戲中的電池、屏幕、材質、相機等均可不斷升級，在你資金充裕時甚至可以啟動CPU和操作系統的自研項目，你將有可能研發出性能逆天的芯片來大幅提升自己的手機品質。

• 新穎的競爭體驗
你作為科技公司的CEO將與各個時期的科技巨頭們展開競爭，你可以選擇和他們搞好關係共謀發展，也可以為爭奪優秀人才展開挖人大戰。

• 大量的隨機事件
為了增加遊戲的世界感，我們在遊戲中融入了大量的隨機事件，包括：世界事件、行業新聞、危機事件、幸運事件、員工事件、記者採訪等等，甚至還包括比如太空電梯、火星登陸、 AI大爆發等未來事件。

• 獨創的說服系統
為了更好的模擬現實生活中的人才招攬過程，我們在遊戲中內置了一款小遊戲，該遊戲以古老的“九型人格”為原型，玩家需要根據招募對象的不同人格類型，採用不同的溝通技巧和策略來說服對方。越是頂級的人才，說服的難度越高。

• 更多等待你探索的內容
遊戲中還包括信用評級、企業併購、情報系統、員工培養、公司戰略等其他好玩的元素等待你來探索。

mo.description:
[遊戲說明]

由幻刃網絡研發，心動網絡發行的《ICEY》是一款2D橫版動作遊戲，跟隨旁白的指示，你將會通過ICEY的眼睛去看，去戰鬥並發掘在遊戲中世界的真相。但其實，這也根本不是一款2D橫版動作遊戲，你也不會通過ICEY的眼睛去看，你也不會去探尋這個世界的真相。

本質上說《ICEY》是一款Meta遊戲，玩家需要通過對抗旁白的指示，思考何爲遊戲、何爲真相等等命題。在《ICEY》中，你扮演的是ICEY，而非“你自己”。當然你也可以扮演“你自己”，而非ICEY。這是一個包裹著動作遊戲外衣的陷阱。

現在，就是你發掘其真正故事的時刻。

[遊戲特色]

·高速戰鬥： 高速移動，將敵人玩弄于股掌之中。 不能遲疑，當機立斷進行攻擊、反擊或是閃避！ 這才是你的生存之道！ 

·華麗的連招系統： 操作簡單，稍微練習即可打出華麗連擊。 不同技能各有特性，靈活組合才能順利過關。 

·巨型Boss戰： 衆多超巨型Boss，充滿壓迫力的戰鬥場面。 Boss攻擊方法多樣，只有找出破綻才能化險爲夷。 

·Meta元素： 玩家在整個遊戲進行中需結合旁白判斷自己下一步的行動。 但是，通過對碎片信息的分析及整理，玩家會漸漸改變自己的行爲及思考模式去進行遊戲並探索其中真正的劇情及核心內容。 跟隨指引，還是叛逆而爲。

一切，由你決定。你，准備好了嗎？	

［獲獎榮耀］

-Nominated, Tokyo Game Show 2016 電擊PlayStation Best Indie Games
-Official Selection, 2016 Gamescom Indie Arena Booth
-Most Promising Game 2nd Prize, Taipei Game Show 2016

mo.description:
《無處遁形：全網公敵》是Steam平臺廣受好評的劇情向駭客解密遊戲《全網公敵》手遊版本。玩家通過網絡蒐索和社工手段獲取目標人物資訊，其隱藏最深的秘密都無處遁形。遊戲中的每個故事看似各自獨立，但隨著劇情的發展卻是草蛇灰線，伏脈千里。當所有事件串聯起來，竟隱藏著驚天的秘密……

希望玩家在遊玩的同時，對網絡本身也能產生反思，學會保護好個人隱私。

【遊戲內容】
◆第一章：程式師之死
某公司CEO跳樓自殺，自稱被毒妻勒索千萬； 而妻子卻在社交網絡上發佈被家暴的照片。 謠言滿天，誰在說謊？
◆第二章：看不見的眼睛
女大學生的不雅視頻在網絡瘋傳，這一刻，她已然社會性死亡。 到底誰才是始作俑者？ 女性的安全又該由誰去保護？
◆第三章：消失的證據
品學兼優的學生會長忽然失踪。 霸淩事件使案情越發撲朔迷離。 誰是兇手，誰是受害者？
◆第四章：羞辱的代價
天降巨瓜，女歌星再次被爆黑料！ 恐嚇信、炒作、前女團成員自殺事件……網絡再掀輿論狂歡！
◆第五章：永生代碼
當社會陷入癲狂，你是否也願意加入永生代碼，獲得真正的愛與永生？
◆DLC：甜蜜之家
一個看似甜蜜而美滿的家庭背後，每個人都有各自的秘密，隱藏在背後的真相到底是什麼？！
◆DLC：HelloWorld
一場離奇的車禍，讓泰坦公司的高級研究員Lucrezia Borgia博士當場死亡，同行的Benjamin Engle死裡逃生，但他卻沒有意識到自己即將捲入一場巨大的陰謀之中……

【遊戲特點】
◆代入感强：在虛構的世界裏，玩家扮演一名駭客，接受一家公司委託，完成一個個不同的社工事件，體驗真實的駭客操作。
◆玩法多樣：遊戲內有多個系統，除了社工系統，還會有推理、追跡、解謎，破壞侵入等系統需要玩家們去一一攻破。
◆劇情複雜：遊戲中你將面臨大量的選擇和謎題，而不同的選擇可能將導致不同的結局。
◆人物眾多：登場人物眾多，每個人物都有自己的性格特點，而他們背後都有著不為人知的故事，需要作為駭客的你去一一發現事件的真相。
◆全程配音：遊戲中所有出現的角色都有真人配音，讓整個遊戲的體驗和代入感更加强烈。
◆原創音樂：多首原創主題曲以及各種音樂音效，搭配精彩劇情，享受震撼體驗。

【覈心功能】
◆網絡蒐索：玩家通過瀏覽器搜索功能收集目標對象的基礎資訊。
◆資料庫：利用已知資訊輸入到資料庫中，通過篩選後或許目標對象的其他資訊。
◆破解：通過獲得的目標人物資訊來生成密碼，用於登入各平臺的帳戶（包括郵箱、社交平臺、聊天軟體等）。

tw.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

Fly with complex airliners, helicopters, business jets, fighter jets and warbirds, general aviation aircraft, aerobatic stuntplanes and gliders across the photorealistic landscape.

▶ AIRCRAFT

tw.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

《手機帝國》是一款以“造手機”為題材的高自由度單機模擬經營遊戲。你扮演一名回到2001年的創業者，因為獨到的眼光拿到了神秘投資人的啟動資金，進而創立了一家可能改變世界的科技企業。遊戲從2001年開始到2035年結束，你將從研發最早期的九宮格智能手機開始，一直到研發可完全獨立使用的AR智能眼鏡結束。在這35年時間裡，你將親歷、見證、推動智能手機波瀾壯闊的發展歷程，並有機會把你的公司發展成為世界第一的科技企業。

• 有深度的玩法
《手機帝國》的核心玩法是研發更好的圖紙、升級更牛的科技、打造更強的團隊、研發更好的手機、賺取更多的利潤，如此循環。而“如何用人”是整個遊戲的精髓所在，根據員工的能力、天賦和技能，把合適的員工放到合適的崗位才會發揮出其最大潛能。員工的配合還會觸發團隊突破效果，這是一個可以讓你突破科技限制從而創造奇蹟的新機制。

• 充足的遊戲時長
《手機帝國》的遊戲內時間長達35年，將從2001年開始到2035年結束，你將親歷、見證、推動智能手機波瀾壯闊的發展歷程。

• 海量的內容
你在遊戲中可研發經典的九宮格手機、全鍵盤手機、早期觸控手機、全面屏手機、折疊屏手機，甚至未來的AR智能眼鏡，總共有超過100種手機外觀供你研究。

• 不斷進階的科技
遊戲中的電池、屏幕、材質、相機等均可不斷升級，在你資金充裕時甚至可以啟動CPU和操作系統的自研項目，你將有可能研發出性能逆天的芯片來大幅提升自己的手機品質。

• 新穎的競爭體驗
你作為科技公司的CEO將與各個時期的科技巨頭們展開競爭，你可以選擇和他們搞好關係共謀發展，也可以為爭奪優秀人才展開挖人大戰。

• 大量的隨機事件
為了增加遊戲的世界感，我們在遊戲中融入了大量的隨機事件，包括：世界事件、行業新聞、危機事件、幸運事件、員工事件、記者採訪等等，甚至還包括比如太空電梯、火星登陸、 AI大爆發等未來事件。

• 獨創的說服系統
為了更好的模擬現實生活中的人才招攬過程，我們在遊戲中內置了一款小遊戲，該遊戲以古老的“九型人格”為原型，玩家需要根據招募對象的不同人格類型，採用不同的溝通技巧和策略來說服對方。越是頂級的人才，說服的難度越高。

• 更多等待你探索的內容
遊戲中還包括信用評級、企業併購、情報系統、員工培養、公司戰略等其他好玩的元素等待你來探索。

tw.description:
[遊戲說明]

由幻刃網絡研發，心動網絡發行的《ICEY》是一款2D橫版動作遊戲，跟隨旁白的指示，你將會通過ICEY的眼睛去看，去戰鬥並發掘在遊戲中世界的真相。但其實，這也根本不是一款2D橫版動作遊戲，你也不會通過ICEY的眼睛去看，你也不會去探尋這個世界的真相。

本質上說《ICEY》是一款Meta遊戲，玩家需要通過對抗旁白的指示，思考何爲遊戲、何爲真相等等命題。在《ICEY》中，你扮演的是ICEY，而非“你自己”。當然你也可以扮演“你自己”，而非ICEY。這是一個包裹著動作遊戲外衣的陷阱。

現在，就是你發掘其真正故事的時刻。

[遊戲特色]

·高速戰鬥： 高速移動，將敵人玩弄于股掌之中。 不能遲疑，當機立斷進行攻擊、反擊或是閃避！ 這才是你的生存之道！ 

·華麗的連招系統： 操作簡單，稍微練習即可打出華麗連擊。 不同技能各有特性，靈活組合才能順利過關。 

·巨型Boss戰： 衆多超巨型Boss，充滿壓迫力的戰鬥場面。 Boss攻擊方法多樣，只有找出破綻才能化險爲夷。 

·Meta元素： 玩家在整個遊戲進行中需結合旁白判斷自己下一步的行動。 但是，通過對碎片信息的分析及整理，玩家會漸漸改變自己的行爲及思考模式去進行遊戲並探索其中真正的劇情及核心內容。 跟隨指引，還是叛逆而爲。

一切，由你決定。你，准備好了嗎？

-Official Selection, 2016 Gamescom Indie Arena Booth

tw.description:
《無處遁形：全網公敵》是Steam平臺廣受好評的劇情向駭客解密遊戲《全網公敵》手遊版本。玩家通過網絡蒐索和社工手段獲取目標人物資訊，其隱藏最深的秘密都無處遁形。遊戲中的每個故事看似各自獨立，但隨著劇情的發展卻是草蛇灰線，伏脈千里。當所有事件串聯起來，竟隱藏著驚天的秘密……

希望玩家在遊玩的同時，對網絡本身也能產生反思，學會保護好個人隱私。

【遊戲內容】
◆第一章：程式師之死
某公司CEO跳樓自殺，自稱被毒妻勒索千萬； 而妻子卻在社交網絡上發佈被家暴的照片。 謠言滿天，誰在說謊？
◆第二章：看不見的眼睛
女大學生的不雅視頻在網絡瘋傳，這一刻，她已然社會性死亡。 到底誰才是始作俑者？ 女性的安全又該由誰去保護？
◆第三章：消失的證據
品學兼優的學生會長忽然失踪。 霸淩事件使案情越發撲朔迷離。 誰是兇手，誰是受害者？
◆第四章：羞辱的代價
天降巨瓜，女歌星再次被爆黑料！ 恐嚇信、炒作、前女團成員自殺事件……網絡再掀輿論狂歡！
◆第五章：永生代碼
當社會陷入癲狂，你是否也願意加入永生代碼，獲得真正的愛與永生？
◆DLC：甜蜜之家
一個看似甜蜜而美滿的家庭背後，每個人都有各自的秘密，隱藏在背後的真相到底是什麼？！
◆DLC：HelloWorld
一場離奇的車禍，讓泰坦公司的高級研究員Lucrezia Borgia博士當場死亡，同行的Benjamin Engle死裡逃生，但他卻沒有意識到自己即將捲入一場巨大的陰謀之中……

【遊戲特點】
◆代入感强：在虛構的世界裏，玩家扮演一名駭客，接受一家公司委託，完成一個個不同的社工事件，體驗真實的駭客操作。
◆玩法多樣：遊戲內有多個系統，除了社工系統，還會有推理、追跡、解謎，破壞侵入等系統需要玩家們去一一攻破。
◆劇情複雜：遊戲中你將面臨大量的選擇和謎題，而不同的選擇可能將導致不同的結局。
◆人物眾多：登場人物眾多，每個人物都有自己的性格特點，而他們背後都有著不為人知的故事，需要作為駭客的你去一一發現事件的真相。
◆全程配音：遊戲中所有出現的角色都有真人配音，讓整個遊戲的體驗和代入感更加强烈。
◆原創音樂：多首原創主題曲以及各種音樂音效，搭配精彩劇情，享受震撼體驗。

【覈心功能】
◆網絡蒐索：玩家通過瀏覽器搜索功能收集目標對象的基礎資訊。
◆資料庫：利用已知資訊輸入到資料庫中，通過篩選後或許目標對象的其他資訊。

us.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

us.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

Game Introduction
Mobile Empire is a simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones", with a high degree of freedom. You will play as an entrepreneur back in 2001. You acquired the initial capital from a mystery investor because of your unique vision and created a technological enterprise that may change the world. The game starts from 2001 and ends in 2035, during which you will start with old school smartphones in the early R&D stages, progressing until AR smart glasses can be independently used. During the 35 years, you will experience, witness, and promote the magnificent development process of smartphones. You have the chance to develop your company into the world's number one technological enterprise.

• Unique theme
Currently, Mobile Empire is probably the only PC simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones". You will have the chance to create miracles and develop your little-known company into a global technological empire. 

• Innovative competition experience
In order to simulate a real business environment, lots of competitors will be constantly updated. Players may cooperate with them for joint development or poach talents from them. 

• Massive amounts of random events
In order to create a better "sense of the world", a great deal of industrial events, world events, crisis events, lucky events, employee events, and news interviews are set in this game for you to make your own choices.

• Bountiful blueprints
The game includes 65 different cell phone blueprints and more than 100 cell phone appearances from 3x3 keypads to full-screen and folding screens, and even includes futuristic AR smart glasses. Bountiful blueprints are yours to explore. 

• Vast technologies
In this game, there are many technologies and accessories are available for upgrade. In addition, with adequate funds, you can even research and develop CPUs with superior performance and experience better operating systems. Customized naming is also supported.

• Creative persuasion system
In terms of talent recruitment, the game provides a very distinctive "persuasion" system. To acquire the top talents, you need to use different communication skills to persuade the recruits according to their personalities.

• Other contents for you to explore
The game also includes credit ratings, company acquisitions, employee development, outsourcing mode, intelligence system, company strategies, and more for you to explore.

• "Mobile Empire" IOS supports the archive of PC games.

us.description:
Cyber Manhunt is a Cyber-Style, Realistic- Society theme, Story-Rich indie game. The game taked place in the Republic of Alivia with some different theme stories ,but the fate of the characters is closely related in there. It will focus on social issues liking big data, hacking, citizen privacy etc... 

We want to reveal the profound themes behind the stories with wonderful plots and gamification. And let players pay more attention to Cyber Violence and Privacy Breaches.

[Contents]
◆Chapter I: Death of a Programmer
The CEO of a company committed suicide by jumping off a building, and claimed that he was extorted tens of millions by his wife. While his wife posted photos of domestic violence on social networks. Who is lying?
◆Chapter II: Invisible Eyes
The indecent video of the female college student went viral on the Internet. At this moment, she was already socially dead. Who is the initiator? Who should protect the safety of women?
◆Chapter III: The Evidence Vanishes
The student council president, who is both excellent in character and study, suddenly disappeared. The bullying incident made the case more complicated. Who is the murderer and who is the victim?
◆Chapter IV: The Price of Humiliation
The female singer has been exposed again! Threatening letters, hype, the suicide of former girl group members... The Internet has set off a public opinion carnival again!
◆Chapter V: Immortal Code
When the society is in madness, are you willing to join the Immortal Code to obtain true love and immortality?
◆DLC: Home Sweet Home
Behind this seemingly sweet and happy family, everyone has their own secrets, what is the truth hidden behind?!
◆DLC: Hello World!
Senior researcher of Titan Dr. Lucrezia died in a terrible car accident on the spot, but the fellow Benjamin took escape from death. But he did not realize that he was about to be involved in a huge conspiracy…

[Features]
◆Highly Immersive: Gamers play as a hacker in the game, accepts the commission of the company, and solve dangerous incidents.
◆Rich Gameplay: There are lots of features of Social Engineering in the game, which is including Detecting, Tracking, Puzzles-Solving, Destroying and Hacking etc..
◆Wonderful Plots: Each chapter in the game will reflect a current hot social topic, such as: Sneak Shot, Cyber Violence, School Bullying, etc...
◆Multiple Roles: There are many different roles in this game with a flash of personality. Their stories would be dug by yourself.
◆Fully Dubbing: All the characters in the game have their own voice actors that make the game experience more immersive.
◆Original Music: There are some original songs in the game, and the lyrics and vocals are all completed by the studio.

[Gameplay]
◆Web Search: You should collect basic information about the targets through the Internet search.
◆Database: You can use the database to get deep information about targets.
◆Crack: You would get passwords based on the obtained target's information, and use it to log in to accounts of different platforms.
◆Chat: The exciting thing is that you need to chat with targets by disguise and use the information to get the trust of the target.
◆Phishing: You can send phishing links to hack the targets' hardware devices, and get private information.
◆Picture Analysis: You can get valuable information and relevant clues from pictures.
More advanced hacking methods will be unlocked later!

us.description:
Earthquake Network is the most comprehensive app on earthquakes and for most world countries it is the only earthquake early warning system for receiving real time alerts.

Earthquake Network gives you:

- Real time alerts if you live close to the epicentre
- Alerts seconds in advances if you live far from the epicentre
- Real time user reports on felt earthquakes
- Free earthquake data from 21 seismic networks including U.S., Puerto Rico, India, Indonesia, Turkey, Mexico, Chile, Peru, Ecuador, Argentina, Venezuela, Dominican Republic, Colombia, Costa Rica, Nicaragua, China, New Zeland, Japan, Italy, Croatia, Spain and Greece

The Earthquake Network research project (https://www.sismo.app) aims at developing a smartphone-based earthquake early warning system able to detect earthquakes in real time and to alert the population in advance. Smartphones are able to detect earthquakes thanks to the accelerometer on-board each device. When an earthquake is detected, users with the application installed are immediatly alerted. Since earthquake waves travel at around 5 km/s it is possible to alert the population not yet reached by the damaging waves of the earthquake. For the scientific details about the project please refer to the scientific paper on Frontiers at https://bit.ly/2C8B5HI

Imagine a magical factory, appearing right in your living room. A carefully planned masterpiece, where diligent workers throw together anything customers want. Rubber ducks and dressers, drones and electric guitars, scooters and other wonderful goods can be created from many different materials and sold for hard cash – cash you invest right back into your factory to get more machines, more workers and grow your business. Real factories - made FUN
You are the Big Boss and it’s time to take charge of your very own tabletop factory. Organize the factory floor, manage your workers, purchase machinery, and design efficient production lines - all within the time-limit and to your client's satisfaction! 

An open-ended sandbox-experience

Supply products to clients and an ever-changing market, as you produce over 50 unique product types, built from multiple parts and pieces - all of which can be created with different materials and production methods. Start out with just a small workshop and expand to a desk-filling factory. Unlock ever fancier machines, add even more production methods, and most of all, more room. tr.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

tr.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

Game Introduction
Mobile Empire is a simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones", with a high degree of freedom. You will play as an entrepreneur back in 2001. You acquired the initial capital from a mystery investor because of your unique vision and created a technological enterprise that may change the world. The game starts from 2001 and ends in 2035, during which you will start with old school smartphones in the early R&D stages, progressing until AR smart glasses can be independently used. During the 35 years, you will experience, witness, and promote the magnificent development process of smartphones. You have the chance to develop your company into the world's number one technological enterprise.

• Unique theme
Currently, Mobile Empire is probably the only PC simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones". You will have the chance to create miracles and develop your little-known company into a global technological empire. 

• Innovative competition experience
In order to simulate a real business environment, lots of competitors will be constantly updated. Players may cooperate with them for joint development or poach talents from them. 

• Massive amounts of random events
In order to create a better "sense of the world", a great deal of industrial events, world events, crisis events, lucky events, employee events, and news interviews are set in this game for you to make your own choices.

• Bountiful blueprints
The game includes 65 different cell phone blueprints and more than 100 cell phone appearances from 3x3 keypads to full-screen and folding screens, and even includes futuristic AR smart glasses. Bountiful blueprints are yours to explore. 

• Vast technologies
In this game, there are many technologies and accessories are available for upgrade. In addition, with adequate funds, you can even research and develop CPUs with superior performance and experience better operating systems. Customized naming is also supported.

• Creative persuasion system
In terms of talent recruitment, the game provides a very distinctive "persuasion" system. To acquire the top talents, you need to use different communication skills to persuade the recruits according to their personalities.

• Other contents for you to explore
The game also includes credit ratings, company acquisitions, employee development, outsourcing mode, intelligence system, company strategies, and more for you to explore.

• "Mobile Empire" IOS supports the archive of PC games.

tr.description:
Cyber Manhunt is a Cyber-Style, Realistic- Society theme, Story-Rich indie game. The game taked place in the Republic of Alivia with some different theme stories ,but the fate of the characters is closely related in there. It will focus on social issues liking big data, hacking, citizen privacy etc... 

We want to reveal the profound themes behind the stories with wonderful plots and gamification. And let players pay more attention to Cyber Violence and Privacy Breaches.

[Contents]
◆Chapter I: Death of a Programmer
The CEO of a company committed suicide by jumping off a building, and claimed that he was extorted tens of millions by his wife. While his wife posted photos of domestic violence on social networks. Who is lying?
◆Chapter II: Invisible Eyes
The indecent video of the female college student went viral on the Internet. At this moment, she was already socially dead. Who is the initiator? Who should protect the safety of women?
◆Chapter III: The Evidence Vanishes
The student council president, who is both excellent in character and study, suddenly disappeared. The bullying incident made the case more complicated. Who is the murderer and who is the victim?
◆Chapter IV: The Price of Humiliation
The female singer has been exposed again! Threatening letters, hype, the suicide of former girl group members... The Internet has set off a public opinion carnival again!
◆Chapter V: Immortal Code
When the society is in madness, are you willing to join the Immortal Code to obtain true love and immortality?
◆DLC: Home Sweet Home
Behind this seemingly sweet and happy family, everyone has their own secrets, what is the truth hidden behind?!
◆DLC: Hello World!
Senior researcher of Titan Dr. Lucrezia died in a terrible car accident on the spot, but the fellow Benjamin took escape from death. But he did not realize that he was about to be involved in a huge conspiracy…

[Features]
◆Highly Immersive: Gamers play as a hacker in the game, accepts the commission of the company, and solve dangerous incidents.
◆Rich Gameplay: There are lots of features of Social Engineering in the game, which is including Detecting, Tracking, Puzzles-Solving, Destroying and Hacking etc..
◆Wonderful Plots: Each chapter in the game will reflect a current hot social topic, such as: Sneak Shot, Cyber Violence, School Bullying, etc...
◆Multiple Roles: There are many different roles in this game with a flash of personality. Their stories would be dug by yourself.
◆Fully Dubbing: All the characters in the game have their own voice actors that make the game experience more immersive.
◆Original Music: There are some original songs in the game, and the lyrics and vocals are all completed by the studio.

[Gameplay]
◆Web Search: You should collect basic information about the targets through the Internet search.
◆Database: You can use the database to get deep information about targets.
◆Crack: You would get passwords based on the obtained target's information, and use it to log in to accounts of different platforms.
◆Chat: The exciting thing is that you need to chat with targets by disguise and use the information to get the trust of the target.
◆Phishing: You can send phishing links to hack the targets' hardware devices, and get private information.
◆Picture Analysis: You can get valuable information and relevant clues from pictures.
More advanced hacking methods will be unlocked later!

・To everyone who will become a train dispatcher
In the morning in Japan, customers are waiting for the arrival of the train to go to work.
Let's start the train and transport the customers.

・Goal of the game
Japanese railway companies are for-profit organizations. Let's aim for high operating profit!

・How to make profit
Fare revenue - Departure cost = Operating profit.

Fare revenue is generated when passengers board at a station.
Example) If two passengers board a train at a station with a fare of 20, the company receives 40.

Departure costs are charged according to the number of cars when the train departs.
Example) 30 for a 2-car train, 40 for a 4-car train, and 70 for a 10-car train.

One person can ride in one car.
Fare revenue is generated when customers board the train.
Adjust the driving schedule and the number of vehicles to aim for the highest profit.
Departure costs. If you run too many trains and the occupancy rate drops, you'll lose revenue.

tr.description:
Imagine a magical factory, appearing right in your living room. A carefully planned masterpiece, where diligent workers throw together anything customers want. Rubber ducks and dressers, drones and electric guitars, scooters and other wonderful goods can be created from many different materials and sold for hard cash – cash you invest right back into your factory to get more machines, more workers and grow your business. In Little Big Workshop you become a factory tycoon!

Real factories - made FUN
You are the Big Boss and it’s time to take charge of your very own tabletop factory. Organize the factory floor, manage your workers, purchase machinery, and design efficient production lines - all within the time-limit and to your client's satisfaction! 

An open-ended sandbox-experience
Take it easy, it’s a sandbox-experience where you think, ponder and poke at things until you get it to work the way you’d like. Supply products to clients and an ever-changing market, as you produce over 50 unique product types, built from multiple parts and pieces - all of which can be created with different materials and production methods. No two factories should ever look the same.

Tiny hands, big dreams
Start out with just a small workshop and expand to a desk-filling factory. Unlock ever fancier machines, add even more production methods, and most of all, more room. Soon enough you’ll be running multiple production lines, producing hundreds of advanced products each day, and watching with joy as your cute workers do the actual work.

Features:
- Varying industries and a wide range of products
- Focus on practical problems, not on values, economics, or logistics
- Organize all steps of the production on a blueprint
- Factories grow as you unlock more desk space
- Fully simulated Day/Night-cycle
- Take care of your workers! Work them too hard and they drop like flies
- Cute model-town art-style

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere.
And there are reminders that you can never forget.

pt.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

《手机帝国》是一款以“造手机”为题材的高自由度单机模拟经营游戏。你扮演一名回到2001年的创业者，因为独到的眼光拿到了神秘投资人的启动资金，进而创立了一家可能改变世界的科技企业。游戏从2001年开始到2035年结束，你将从研发最早期的九宫格智能手机开始，一直到研发可完全独立使用的AR智能眼镜结束。在这35年时间里，你将亲历、见证、推动智能手机波澜壮阔的发展历程，并有机会把你的公司发展成为世界第一的科技企业。

•有深度的玩法
《手机帝国》的核心玩法是研发更好的图纸、升级更牛的科技、打造更强的团队、研发更好的手机、赚取更多的利润，如此循环。而“如何用人”是整个游戏的精髓所在，根据员工的能力、天赋和技能，把合适的员工放到合适的岗位才会发挥出其最大潜能。员工的配合还会触发团队突破效果，这是一个可以让你突破科技限制从而创造奇迹的新机制。

•海量的内容
你在游戏中可研发经典的九宫格手机、全键盘手机、早期触控手机、全面屏手机、折叠屏手机，甚至未来的AR智能眼镜，总共有超过100种手机外观供你研究。

•不断进阶的科技
游戏中的电池、屏幕、材质、相机等均可不断升级，在你资金充裕时甚至可以启动CPU和操作系统的自研项目，你将有可能研发出性能逆天的芯片来大幅提升自己的手机品质。

•新颖的竞争体验
你作为科技公司的CEO将与各个时期的科技巨头们展开竞争，你可以选择和他们搞好关系共谋发展，也可以为争夺优秀人才展开挖人大战。

•大量的随机事件
为了增加游戏的世界感，我们在游戏中融入了大量的随机事件，包括：世界事件、行业新闻、危机事件、幸运事件、员工事件、记者采访等等，甚至还包括比如太空电梯、火星登陆、AI大爆发等未来事件。

•独创的说服系统
为了更好的模拟现实生活中的人才招揽过程，我们在游戏中内置了一款小游戏，该游戏以古老的“九型人格”为原型，玩家需要根据招募对象的不同人格类型，采用不同的沟通技巧和策略来说服对方。越是顶级的人才，说服的难度越高。

•更多等待你探索的内容
游戏中还包括信用评级、企业并购、情报系统、员工培养、公司战略等其他好玩的元素等待你来探索。

pt.description:
ICEY is a 2D side-scrolling action game. As you follow the narrator's omnipresent voice, you will see through ICEY's eyes and learn the truth about her world. 

“Alright, you caught me! This ISN'T really just a simple 2D action game, and you WON'T be seeing through ICEY's eyes... NOR will you learn the truth about her world." says the narrator. 

“ICEY is a Meta game in disguise. The narrator will constantly urge you in one direction, but you must ask, "Why? Why am I following his directions? Why can't I learn the truth about this world and ICEY's purpose here?" Fight against his tyranny, and uncover what's really going on for yourself!

In fact, you can become ICEY, and let loose the shackles of your own identity. You are ICEY, and ICEY is you... if you want it that way. Feel free to keep hold of your own self, if you wish. 

Now Is the Time For You to Discover the Truth.

[FEATURES]

Fast-paced Combat: 
Crush enemies in the palm of your hand. 
Attack! Dodge! Counterattack! Do not hesitate. 
This is the only way to survive!

With simple controls, amazing combos are easy to unleash, even for beginners. 
Every skill is special in its own way. Master your favorites and create your own fighting style!

pt.description:
Cyber Manhunt is a Cyber-Style, Realistic- Society theme, Story-Rich indie game. The game taked place in the Republic of Alivia with some different theme stories ,but the fate of the characters is closely related in there. It will focus on social issues liking big data, hacking, citizen privacy etc... 

We want to reveal the profound themes behind the stories with wonderful plots and gamification. And let players pay more attention to Cyber Violence and Privacy Breaches.

[Contents]
◆Chapter I: Death of a Programmer
The CEO of a company committed suicide by jumping off a building, and claimed that he was extorted tens of millions by his wife. While his wife posted photos of domestic violence on social networks. Who is lying?
◆Chapter II: Invisible Eyes
The indecent video of the female college student went viral on the Internet. At this moment, she was already socially dead. Who is the initiator? Who should protect the safety of women?
◆Chapter III: The Evidence Vanishes
The student council president, who is both excellent in character and study, suddenly disappeared. The bullying incident made the case more complicated. Who is the murderer and who is the victim?
◆Chapter IV: The Price of Humiliation
The female singer has been exposed again! Threatening letters, hype, the suicide of former girl group members... The Internet has set off a public opinion carnival again!
◆Chapter V: Immortal Code
When the society is in madness, are you willing to join the Immortal Code to obtain true love and immortality?
◆DLC: Home Sweet Home
Behind this seemingly sweet and happy family, everyone has their own secrets, what is the truth hidden behind?!
◆DLC: Hello World!
Senior researcher of Titan Dr. Lucrezia died in a terrible car accident on the spot, but the fellow Benjamin took escape from death. But he did not realize that he was about to be involved in a huge conspiracy…

[Features]
◆Highly Immersive: Gamers play as a hacker in the game, accepts the commission of the company, and solve dangerous incidents.
◆Rich Gameplay: There are lots of features of Social Engineering in the game, which is including Detecting, Tracking, Puzzles-Solving, Destroying and Hacking etc..
◆Wonderful Plots: Each chapter in the game will reflect a current hot social topic, such as: Sneak Shot, Cyber Violence, School Bullying, etc...
◆Multiple Roles: There are many different roles in this game with a flash of personality. Their stories would be dug by yourself.
◆Fully Dubbing: All the characters in the game have their own voice actors that make the game experience more immersive.
◆Original Music: There are some original songs in the game, and the lyrics and vocals are all completed by the studio.

[Gameplay]
◆Web Search: You should collect basic information about the targets through the Internet search.
◆Database: You can use the database to get deep information about targets.
◆Crack: You would get passwords based on the obtained target's information, and use it to log in to accounts of different platforms.
◆Chat: The exciting thing is that you need to chat with targets by disguise and use the information to get the trust of the target.
◆Phishing: You can send phishing links to hack the targets' hardware devices, and get private information.
◆Picture Analysis: You can get valuable information and relevant clues from pictures.
More advanced hacking methods will be unlocked later!

Torne-se uma empresa ferroviária japonesa e assuma a corrida mais movimentada do mundo!

Não é necessário nenhum conhecimento ferroviário para jogar "Tokyo Train 1".
Este jogo é um jogo de cérebro com regras simples, mas requer muito poder cerebral.

Os clientes esperam na estação que os comboios cheguem para os levar aos seus destinos.
Comece os comboios e transporte os seus clientes.

Ajuste o intervalo entre as viagens e o número de vagões para alcançar a maior receita.

O método de operação é muito fácil e as regras são simples.
Só tem de ajustar o número de vagões e fazer com que os comboios partem na melhor altura.
À medida que o jogo avança, as tarifas expressas também aparecerão.

Não é necessário qualquer conhecimento técnico.
Tanto as pessoas que gostam de comboios como as pessoas que gostam de jogos podem rapidamente compreender e desfrutar do jogo.

Não há compras em espera. Não há anúncios.
Por favor, concentrem-se no jogo.
Partilhe os seus resultados operacionais nas redes sociais.

Façam os comboios do Japão funcionar!

・Simple jogo do cérebro
O "Train Dispatcher!2" é um jogo do cérebro com regras simples. Não é necessária perícia.
Treinar fãs, fãs de jogos, todos podem apreciá-lo.

・To todos os que se tornarão um despachante de comboios
De manhã, no Japão, os clientes aguardam a chegada do comboio para irem trabalhar.
Vamos iniciar o comboio e transportar os clientes.

・Goal do jogo
As empresas ferroviárias japonesas são organizações com fins lucrativos. Apontemos para um elevado lucro operacional!

・How para ter lucro
Receitas tarifárias - Custo de partida = lucro operacional.

As receitas tarifárias são geradas quando os passageiros embarcam numa estação.
Exemplo) Se dois passageiros embarcarem num comboio numa estação com uma tarifa de 20, a companhia recebe 40.

Os custos de partida são cobrados de acordo com o número de vagões quando o comboio parte.
Exemplo) 30 para um comboio de 2 carruagens, 40 para um comboio de 4 carruagens, e 70 para um comboio de 10 carruagens.

Uma pessoa pode andar num vagão.
As receitas das tarifas são geradas quando os clientes embarcam no comboio.
Ajustar o horário de condução e o número de veículos de modo a obter o maior lucro.
Custos de partida. Se correr demasiados comboios e a taxa de ocupação baixar, perderá receitas.

・How para operar
O jogo é muito fácil de operar e as regras são simples.
Tudo o que tem de fazer é ajustar o número de vagões e fazer com que os comboios partem no melhor momento.
À medida que o jogo avança, várias variações, tais como comboios expresso e estações de transferência, irão aparecer.

・Volume
Desfrute de mais de 50 rotas.
Por favor, experimente a grande variedade de estratégias de transporte das empresas ferroviárias japonesas.
Sem anúncios, sem taxas.

・No anúncios, sem facturação
Por favor, concentrem-se no jogo. As crianças também podem desfrutar do jogo.
Partilhe os seus resultados no Redes sociais.

pt.description:
Imagine uma fábrica mágica bem na sua sala. Uma obra de arte cuidadosamente planejada, onde funcionários dedicados criam qualquer coisa que os clientes desejarem. Patos de borracha e cômodas, drones e guitarras elétricas, patinetes e outras coisas incríveis podem ser criadas a partir de diferentes materiais e vendidas em troca de dinheiro – o qual você pode reinvestir na fábrica para obter mais máquinas, mais funcionários e expandir o seu negócio. Na Little Big Workshop, você se torna um magnata da fabricação!

Fábricas de verdade - só que DIVERTIDAS
Você é o Chefe e é hora de assumir a sua própria fábrica. Organize o chão da fábrica, gerencie seus funcionários, compre maquinário e monte linhas de produção eficientes – tudo dentro do prazo e garantindo a satisfação do cliente! 

Uma experiência aberta sandbox
Vá com calma: essa é uma experiência sandbox em que você pensa, reflete e mexe nas coisas até conseguir deixar as coisas do jeito que quiser. Forneça produtos para clientes num mercado em constante mudança, produzindo mais de 50 tipos únicos de produtos feitos com inúmeras partes e peças – sendo que todos podem ser criados com diferentes materiais e métodos de produção. Não existem duas fábricas iguais.

Mãos pequenas, sonhos grandes
Comece com uma pequena oficina e a transforme numa fábrica cheia de oficinas. Desbloqueie máquinas cada vez mais sofisticadas, acrescente ainda mais métodos de produção e, o mais importante, crie mais espaço. Em breve você terá várias linhas de produção, produzindo centenas de produtos avançados todos os dias e observando com alegria os seus funcionários fofinhos realizarem o trabalho pesado.

Características:
- Indústrias variadas e uma ampla gama de produtos
- Foco em problemas práticos, não em valores, economia ou logística
- Organize todos os passos da produção no papel primeiro
- As fábricas crescem à medida que você desbloqueia mais espaço para mesas
- Ciclo diurno / noturno totalmente simulado
- Cuide dos seus funcionários! Se eles trabalharem demais, eles caem como moscas
- Linda arte em estilo de cidade modelo

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere.
And there are reminders that you can never forget.
